understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to reach the goal gem tile `+` on each level, avoiding spike hazards, within the turn limit.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Horizontal movement (MOVE_LEFT, MOVE_RIGHT) causes the player to fall in the current gravity direction until landing on a solid tile, a spike (instant death), or the goal. CLICK removes breakable blocks at a specified target position to open paths. UNDO reverts the last action. Spikes (`u`/`v`) kill on contact. Each level has 50 turns per attempt and 2 attempts total.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to reach the goal gem tile `+` on each level, avoiding spike hazards, within the turn limit.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Horizontal movement (MOVE_LEFT, MOVE_RIGHT) causes the player to fall in the current gravity direction until landing on a solid tile, a spike (instant death), or the goal. CLICK removes breakable blocks at a specified target position to open paths. UNDO reverts the last action. Spikes (`u`/`v`) kill on contact. Each level has 50 turns per attempt and 2 attempts total.
